name: /measure-rubric --dry-run short-circuits and reports the iteration count without invoking any detector per the §2.14 dry-run contract
command: git init -q repo && cd repo && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --n 5 --dry-run 2>err.txt && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && grep -q 'iterating 5 commits' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
